---
title: "Quantitative Methods Course"
---

Welcome to the Quantitative Methods course repository. 

Here you will find the materials, labs, and assignments for the course.

## Sessions

* [Week 1: Introduction and Data Structures](Sessions/W1_Intro_and_data/index.qmd)

## Labs

* [Week 1 Data Lab: Loading and Visualizing Data](Labs/W1_Intro_and_data/index.qmd)
